real_callstack_explanation: Tests run in-process via vitest with mock HTTP upstreams (createServer). No real LLM API was contacted. Prior real-LLM verification: docs/evidence/compression-zlib-repro-2026-06-24/
side_by_side_runner: scripts/test-side-by-side.mjs (ports 18888/18889) — 86.2% payload reduction, 86.5% tool def reduction, 0 duplicate chunks
